name: heartbeat
description: Maintain a heartbeat file that proves the restoration loop is running

invariants.condition: ~/.jinn-restore/heartbeat.txt was modified in the last 65 minutes
invariants.assessment: Check the modification time of ~/.jinn-restore/heartbeat.txt using stat or find. If the file doesn't exist or was modified more than 65 minutes ago, write the current ISO 8601 timestamp to it.
